shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The overlay panel uses dark slate framing, cream text wells, and gold dividers.
differences: The panel expands to 900x600px and includes an entry list, detail card, and reward row.
Teal card accents and pink unlock stamps connect the codex to the slime evolution fantasy.
A dimmed outer border leaves room for a separate world mask node.

context.usage: Full-screen overlay used to inspect discovered evolutions and rewards.

specs.shading: Flat panel fill with bright card wells and a dark outer frame.

acceptance_criteria: Panel texture size is exactly 900x600px and separates entry list, detail card, and reward row regions.
Title and list zones leave enough margin for readable overlaid text.
The detail card area can frame a 96x96px rare slime portrait.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_slime_units
reference_images.purpose: Grounds slime silhouettes, evolution scale, and facial placement.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle overlay root with scrollable child nodes for entries and a detail card container.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/art_000017.png during the Loading state and pair it with icon and text nodes for discovered entries.
runtime_notes: Keep the dim world mask as a separate fullscreen node.
Use a scrollable entry column with explicit clipping.
Expose unlock badge anchors for rare-evolution stamps.
